skills.name: beecharts
skills.description: Build dashboards with composable BeeCharts — install @beecharts/* via shadcn, compose Bee*Chart children, theme colors, BI recipes. Use when the user asks for charts, graphs, KPIs, sparklines, funnels, waterfalls, heatmaps, histograms, pareto, gauges, or @beecharts / BeeCharts components. NOT for contributing to the beecharts repo.

skills.name: beecharts-dev
skills.description: Contribute to the BeeCharts repository — engine, registry, examples, chart-recipes, and compilers. Use when adding charts, registry items, or examples in beecharts. Covers primitives only, no duplicate BI chart modules. NOT for integrating @beecharts/* in external consumer apps.

skills.name: beecharts-docs
skills.description: Builds and extends the BeeCharts documentation site (Fumadocs + Next.js). Covers MDX pages, ComponentPreview wiring, landing, agent HTTP routes, and llms.txt. Use when adding docs, installation pages, or agent surfaces in this repo. Pair with beecharts-dev for registry/engine work; do not use the consumer skill in this repo.
